title: Bucket of Wet Slop
description: The world is in turmoil and people are in pain. Even still, we can take comfort in knowing that there is bucket of wet slop.
body:
# Bucket of Wet Slop "The world is in turmoil and people are in pain. Even still, we can take comfort in knowing that there is bucket of wet slop. Grins."
\- Someone (I couldn't be bothered looking up who said this)
### What does this mod do? This mod adds a Bucket of Wet Slop. That's it.
Absolutely perfectly safe slop that won't poison the surrounding environment! ### Where can I find this slop? The slop does not appear naturally in the world and instead must be crafted with a *Slime Block*, *Water Bucket* and *Empty Bucket*. The empty bucket is in the recipe because it's not worth writing an entire custom crafting system just to prevent the water bucket from leaving a second empty bucket behind. ### Screenshots below: ![Bucket of Wet Slop](https://github.com/FrostBird347/Bucket-Of-Wet-Slop/blob/master/media/VanillaCrafting.png?raw=true)
![Wet Slop](https://github.com/FrostBird347/Bucket-Of-Wet-Slop/blob/master/media/Fluid.png?raw=true)
The mod also supports Create:
![Create Support](https://github.com/FrostBird347/Bucket-Of-Wet-Slop/blob/master/media/CreateTank.png?raw=true)
NOTE: By downloading this mod you accept all responsibility for any slop related accidents caused by this mod.
